case_title: BERT W. LAW VS. QI WEI CHEN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-07-2008 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-06-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, QI WEI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-07-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-07-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT.ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. VIVIAN CHOY INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SHANGHINESE - SHANGHINESE/ENGLISH ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY LAW, BERT W. AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, QI WEI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-07-2008 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAW, BERT W. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEN, QI WEI $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,100.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, QI WEI
